tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Must.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Must का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We must follow the rules. You must tell the truth. We must arrive on time. You must wear a seatbelt. He must be very tired.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Must.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Must का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We must obey the law. You must study carefully. This must be true. We must fulfill our responsibility. You must not smoke.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "उसे बहुत बुद्धिमान होना चाहिए।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "You musts wear a seatbelt."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Must.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Must का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: You must fill this form. We must protect the environment. This must be a mistake. We must respect our parents.
